summary: Bulk mentor upload feature tested successfully. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly. Fixed a bug where MentorsSection was calling non-existent /api/admin/logo-repository endpoint instead of /api/admin/logos.

minor.issue: Rows with empty name/email are silently skipped instead of reporting an error (line 1114 checks if row[0] is empty and continues without adding to errors list)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: AdminComponents.jsx line 1355 - Changed /api/admin/logo-repository to /api/admin/logos with error handling
Backend bulk upload correctly creates mentors with is_hidden=true by default
Template download returns valid xlsx file (6765 bytes)
Invalid file type rejection working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All bulk upload UI elements working

seed_data_creation: Created test mentors via bulk upload: bulktest_*, hiddentest_*, testmentor1@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk mentor upload feature fully tested. Template download works, bulk upload creates mentors as hidden by default, duplicate email detection works, invalid file type rejection works. Fixed frontend bug where MentorsSection was calling wrong API endpoint.

template_download.details: GET /api/admin/mentors/template returns valid xlsx file (6765 bytes)

bulk_upload_valid_excel.details: POST /api/admin/mentors/bulk-upload creates mentors from Excel file
bulk_upload_valid_excel.ui_flow: Bulk Upload button triggers file picker, upload shows success/error message

bulk_upload_duplicate_email.details: Duplicate emails show 'already exists' error in response
bulk_upload_duplicate_email.ui_display: Error messages displayed in amber box with bullet points

bulk_upload_invalid_file.details: Non-Excel files return 400 error with message about Excel format

mentors_hidden_by_default.details: All bulk uploaded mentors have is_hidden=true

mentor_list_display.details: All mentors (including hidden) appear in admin mentor list
mentor_list_display.ui_display: Hidden mentors have amber background and 'Hidden' badge

frontend_api_endpoint_bug.issue: MentorsSection was calling /api/admin/logo-repository which doesn't exist, causing Promise.all to fail and mentors not loading
frontend_api_endpoint_bug.fix: Changed to /api/admin/logos with .catch() fallback to empty array

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data. Mock-login endpoints are for testing purposes only.
